title: Smart India Hackathon 2026
company: Ministry of Education, Govt. of India
description: National level hackathon for students across India. Solve pressing challenges faced by government departments. Focus on AI, cybersecurity, IoT, and web applications.

title: Google Girl Hackathon 2026
description: Google's premium hackathon for women engineering students in India. Compete in algorithms and system design challenges. High-ranking participants unlock direct interviews.

title: Flipkart GRID 8.0 - Software Development Track
description: Flipkart's flagship engineering competition. Multi-level coding challenge testing data structures, backend engineering, and scalable web architectures.

title: TCS CodeVita Season 13
description: The world's largest competitive programming contest. Solve complex mathematical and computational puzzles. Top performers get direct job offers at TCS.

title: AI Innovation Challenge
description: Build intelligent agents and generative AI applications using Microsoft Azure. Target areas: healthcare, finance, and conversational tools.

title: Junior Software Engineer
description: Join JPMorgan's technology team. Develop, test, and maintain enterprise software solutions. Write clean SQL queries, design APIs, and participate in Agile development.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Build NLP pipelines and conversational AI assistants for Jio's digital platforms. Deploy models in production environments and analyze massive datasets.

title: Python Developer (GenAI Team)
description: Work on state-of-the-art GenAI search and automation tools. Develop AI agents using LangChain and deploy backends on AWS. Highly technical role.

title: Software Engineer Intern
description: Solve hard, scale-related problems in Amazon's retail and cloud divisions. Code backends, manage databases, and write automated tests.

title: Associate AI Engineer (Remote)
description: Develop and fine-tune Large Language Models for global companies. Build intelligent software agents. 100% remote job with USD pay rates.

title: Graduate Tech Intern
description: Support Capgemini's delivery teams. Assist in software debugging, writing sql queries, and designing user interface components. Excellent onboarding program.

title: Data Analyst (SQL & Python)
description: Analyze financial transaction datasets, build database reports, and compile dashboards for executives. Write optimized SQL queries and scripts.

title: Associate Software Engineer
description: Beginner software engineer role. Participate in client projects, write clean code in Java/Python, and learn DevOps pipelines.

title: AI & Data Science Intern
description: Work on computer vision and automotive AI projects. Preprocess video datasets, train deep learning networks, and debug Python modules.
